encounter.location: Cascade Community Health Center, 8205 SE Foster Road, Portland, OR 97206

medications.name: albuterol sulfate 90 mcg/actuation HFA inhaler
medications.sig: Inhale 2 puffs by mouth as needed for wheezing or shortness of breath

document_references.description: Scheduled asthma follow-up telephone call by care coordinator Priya Nair, RN. Patient reports significant symptom improvement with decreased albuterol use to every other day and implementation of environmental trigger avoidance (mask use in cold and dusty environments). Assessment: well-controlled mild intermittent asthma, no step-up therapy indicated. Plan to continue current PRN albuterol regimen and return for next annual wellness visit.
